sales_page_raw: Welcome to Skool Games! Learn how to make $10,000/month by starting your own online community and selling your own courses. Limited seats available, price increases in 2 hours! Become a certified Skool Game Coach and earn 40% monthly recurring commissions by recruiting new students to our platform.

youtube_search.title: Why Skool Games is a pyramid scheme
youtube_search.description: An in-depth review of Skool Games monetization model.

transcripts.skool_vid_1: In this video we analyze Skool Games. It is a recurring commission pyramid structure. Most creators make money by selling courses on how to make money. It is recursive and low value.

web_search.title: Skool Games MLM Reviews
web_search.snippet: Many users report that Skool Games focuses on selling the platform itself rather than actual business skills.
